subcodes.first_line: O thou servant at the Threshold of God! Though physical distance may span a hundred thousand leagues, yet the affection thus engendered hath the power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه الهی هر چند بعد فاصله صد هزار فرسنگ است ولی الفت حاصله حکم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
